title: Amtech G1611 280mm (11") Notched Float Trowel with Soft Grip Handle
features: DURABLE: This 280mm (11") notched float trowel has a hardened and tempered carbon steel blade for durability
VERSATILE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: With a soft grip handle for a comfortable grip, it has 6mm x 6mm notches on two sides and is ideal for applying wall tile adhesive
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering.
